title: Tick Control in Gravesend, Brooklyn | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Gravesend, Brooklyn starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Gravesend residents face increasing tick concerns in yards, parks, and green spaces throughout the neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services designed to protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments create a safe barrier around your Gravesend property, starting at just $125.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of local Brooklyn experience to every Gravesend tick treatment. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: From the single-family homes near Homecrest Avenue to the yards surrounding Gravesend Park and Bay 50th Street, ticks thrive in Gravesend's residential greenery and proximity to Marine Park. Our team understands the unique challenges of tick prevention in this established Brooklyn neighborhood with its mix of private gardens, tree-lined streets, and nearby wooded areas.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Gravesend range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and customized quotes for all Gravesend homes, with seasonal packages available for ongoing protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Gravesend, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Gravesend typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, mild winters can extend tick activity year-round in Brooklyn. We recommend beginning preventive treatments in early spring before tick populations peak.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries completely. All our technicians are trained in safe application methods specific to residential properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Gravesend?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day tick control services for most Gravesend properties. Our team serves the entire Gravesend area including locations near Kings Highway, Avenue U, and throughout the neighborhood. Contact us by morning for potential same-day treatment, especially during peak tick season.
